ast.name: description
ast.source: Alphabetic Presentation Forms. Ligatures for latin, Armenian, and Hebrew.
ast.target: 字母呈现形式。用于拉丁文、亚美尼亚文和希伯来文的连字。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Arabic Presentation Forms-A. Contextual forms / ligatures for Persian, Urdu, Sindhi, Central Asian languages, etc, Arabic pedagogical symbols, word ligatures.
ast.target: 阿拉伯文呈现形式-A。用于波斯文、乌尔都文、信德文、中亚语言等的上下文形式/连字，阿拉伯文教学符号，词连字。

ast.name: description
ast.source: @font-face descriptor. Defines the set of Unicode codepoints that may be supported by the font face for which it is declared.
ast.target: @font-face 描述符。定义该字体可能支持的一组 Unicode 码点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Align the after edge of the extended inline box with the after-edge of the line box.
ast.target: 将扩展内联框的后边缘与行框的后边缘对齐。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Align the before edge of the extended inline box with the before-edge of the line box.
ast.target: 将扩展内联框的前边缘与行框的前边缘对齐。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The generated box is invisible (fully transparent, nothing is drawn), but still affects layout.
ast.target: 生成的框不可见（完全透明，不绘制任何内容），但仍会影响布局。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The generated box is visible.
ast.target: 生成的框可见。

ast.name: description
ast.source: In webkit applications, -webkit-box-direction specifies whether a box lays out its contents normally (from the top or left edge), or in reverse (from the bottom or right edge).
ast.target: 在 webkit 应用中，-webkit-box-direction 指定框是正常布局其内容（从上边或左边缘）还是反向布局（从下边或右边缘）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: In webkit applications, -webkit-box-orient specifies whether a box lays out its contents horizontally or vertically.
ast.target: 在 webkit 应用中，-webkit-box-orient 指定框是水平还是垂直布局其内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The reflection appears above the border box.
ast.target: 反射显示在边框框的上方。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The reflection appears below the border box.
ast.target: 反射显示在边框框的下方。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The reflection appears to the left of the border box.
ast.target: 反射显示在边框框的左侧。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The reflection appears to the right of the border box.
ast.target: 反射显示在边框框的右侧。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines a reflection of a border box.
ast.target: 定义边框框的反射。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Neither force nor forbid a page/column break before/after the generated box.
ast.target: 既不强制也不禁止在生成的框前/后分页/分栏。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Avoid a page/column break before/after the generated box.
ast.target: 避免在生成的框前/后分页/分栏。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Avoid a column break before/after the generated box.
ast.target: 避免在生成的框前/后分栏。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Avoid a page break before/after the generated box.
ast.target: 避免在生成的框前/后分页。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Always force a column break before/after the generated box.
ast.target: 始终在生成的框前/后强制分栏。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Describes the page/column break behavior before the generated box.
ast.target: 描述生成的框前的分页/分栏行为。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Neither force nor forbid a page/column break inside the generated box.
ast.target: 既不强制也不禁止在生成的框内分页/分栏。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Avoid a page/column break inside the generated box.
ast.target: 避免在生成的框内分页/分栏。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Avoid a column break inside the generated box.
ast.target: 避免在生成的框内分栏。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Describes the page/column break behavior inside the generated box.
ast.target: 描述生成的盒子内的分页/分栏断行行为。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This property is a shorthand for setting 'column-rule-width', 'column-rule-style', and 'column-rule-color' at the same place in the style sheet. Omitted values are set to their initial values.
ast.target: 此属性是用于在样式表中同一位置设置 'column-rule-width'、'column-rule-style' 和 'column-rule-color' 的简写。省略的值将设置为其初始值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This property provides low-level control over OpenType font features. It is intended as a way of providing access to font features that are not widely used but are needed for a particular use case.
ast.target: 此属性提供对 OpenType 字体特性的低层级控制。它旨在提供对不常用但特定场景所需字体特性的访问方式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies line-breaking rules for CJK (Chinese, Japanese, and Korean) text.
ast.target: 指定 CJK（中文、日文和韩文）文本的断行规则。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Determines the mask painting area, which determines the area that is affected by the mask.
ast.target: 确定蒙版的绘制区域，从而决定受蒙版影响的区域。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines the behavior of nonbreaking spaces within text.
ast.target: 定义文本中不换行空格的行为。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Content flows as it would in a regular content box.
ast.target: 内容流动方式与常规内容盒子相同。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the content fits within the CSS Region, then this property has no effect.
ast.target: 如果内容适配在 CSS Region 内，则此属性无效。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The 'region-fragment' property controls the behavior of the last region associated with a named flow.
ast.target: 'region-fragment' 属性控制与命名流关联的最后一个区域的行为。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the minimum number of line boxes of a block container that must be left in a fragment after a break.
ast.target: 指定在断开后必须留在某个片段中的块容器行框的最小数量。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the width of the content area, padding area or border area (depending on 'box-sizing') of certain boxes.
ast.target: 指定某些盒子的内容区域、内边距区域或边框区域（取决于 'box-sizing'）的宽度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Expresses no particular intent.
ast.target: 不表达任何特定意图。

ast.name: description
ast.source: No additional spacing is applied. Computes to zero.
ast.target: 不应用额外间距。计算结果为零。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies additional spacing between "words".
ast.target: 指定“单词”之间的额外间距。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Top-to-bottom block flow direction. The writing mode is horizontal.
ast.target: 自上而下的块流方向。书写模式为水平。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Left-to-right block flow direction. The writing mode is vertical, while the typographic mode is horizontal.
ast.target: 自左向右的块流方向。书写模式为垂直，而排版模式为水平。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Right-to-left block flow direction. The writing mode is vertical, while the typographic mode is horizontal.
ast.target: 自右向左的块流方向。书写模式为垂直，而排版模式为水平。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Left-to-right block flow direction. The writing mode is vertical.
ast.target: 自左向右的块流方向。书写模式为垂直。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Right-to-left block flow direction. The writing mode is vertical.
ast.target: 自右向左的块流方向。书写模式为垂直。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This is a shorthand property for both 'direction' and 'block-progression'.
ast.target: 这是同时针对 'direction' 和 'block-progression' 的简写属性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: For a positioned box, the 'z-index' property specifies the stack level of the box in the current stacking context and whether the box establishes a local stacking context.
ast.target: 对于定位盒子，'z-index' 属性指定该盒子在当前堆叠上下文中的层级，并决定该盒子是否建立本地堆叠上下文。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Non-standard. Specifies the magnification scale of the object. See 'transform: scale()' for a standards-based alternative.
ast.target: 非标准。指定对象的放大倍率。标准替代方案请参见 'transform: scale()'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The -moz-force-broken-image-icon extended CSS property can be used to force the broken image icon to be shown even when a broken image has an alt attribute.
ast.target: -moz-force-broken-image-icon 扩展 CSS 属性可用于强制显示损坏的图像图标，即使损坏的图像具有 alt 属性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The -moz-text-blink non-standard Mozilla CSS extension specifies the blink mode.
ast.target: -moz-text-blink 非标准 Mozilla CSS 扩展指定闪烁模式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The -moz-window-dragging CSS property specifies whether a window is draggable or not. It only works in Chrome code, and only on Mac OS X.
ast.target: -moz-window-dragging CSS 属性指定窗口是否可拖动。它仅在 Chrome 代码中生效，并且仅适用于 Mac OS X。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The -moz-window-shadow CSS property specifies whether a window will have a shadow. It only works on Mac OS X.
ast.target: -moz-window-shadow CSS 属性指定窗口是否具有阴影。它只在 Mac OS X 上有效。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The -webkit-border-before CSS property is a shorthand property for setting the individual logical block start border property values in a single place in the style sheet.
ast.target: -webkit-border-before CSS 属性是一个简写属性，用于在样式表中一次性设置各个逻辑块起始边框属性值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The -webkit-border-before-color CSS property sets the color of the individual logical block start border in a single place in the style sheet.
ast.target: -webkit-border-before-color CSS 属性在样式表中一次性设置各个逻辑块起始边框的颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The -webkit-border-before-style CSS property sets the style of the individual logical block start border in a single place in the style sheet.
ast.target: -webkit-border-before-style CSS 属性在样式表中一次性设置各个逻辑块起始边框的样式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The -webkit-border-before-width CSS property sets the width of the individual logical block start border in a single place in the style sheet.
ast.target: -webkit-border-before-width CSS 属性在样式表中一次性设置各个逻辑块起始边框的宽度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The -webkit-line-clamp CSS property allows limiting of the contents of a block container to the specified number of lines.
ast.target: -webkit-line-clamp CSS 属性允许将块容器的内容限制为指定的行数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If a -webkit-mask-image is specified, -webkit-mask-attachment determines whether the mask image's position is fixed within the viewport, or scrolls along with its containing block.
ast.target: 如果指定了 -webkit-mask-image，-webkit-mask-attachment 用于确定遮罩图像的位置是在视口内固定，还是随其包含块一起滚动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The mask-position CSS property sets the initial position, relative to the mask position layer defined by mask-origin, for each defined mask image.
ast.target: mask-position CSS 属性为每个已定义的遮罩图像设置相对于由 mask-origin 定义的遮罩定位层的初始位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The -webkit-mask-position-x CSS property sets the initial horizontal position of a mask image.
ast.target: -webkit-mask-position-x CSS 属性设置遮罩图像的初始水平位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The -webkit-mask-position-y CSS property sets the initial vertical position of a mask image.
ast.target: -webkit-mask-position-y CSS 属性设置遮罩图像的初始垂直位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The -webkit-mask-repeat-x property specifies whether and how a mask image is repeated (tiled) horizontally.
ast.target: -webkit-mask-repeat-x 属性指定遮罩图像是否以及如何在水平方向重复（平铺）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The -webkit-mask-repeat-y property specifies whether and how a mask image is repeated (tiled) vertically.
ast.target: -webkit-mask-repeat-y 属性指定遮罩图像是否以及如何在垂直方向重复（平铺）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The align-tracks CSS property sets the alignment in the masonry axis for grid containers that have masonry in their block axis.
ast.target: align-tracks CSS 属性为在块轴上使用砌体布局的网格容器设置砌体轴上的对齐方式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The composite operation to use when multiple animations affect the same property.
ast.target: 当多个动画影响同一属性时要使用的合成操作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The animation-range CSS shorthand property is used to set the start and end of an animation's attachment range along its timeline, i.e. where along the timeline an animation will start and end.
ast.target: animation-range CSS 简写属性用于设置动画沿时间线的附着范围起点和终点，即动画在时间线上的开始与结束位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The animation-range-end CSS property is used to set the end of an animation's attachment range along its timeline, i.e. where along the timeline an animation will end.
ast.target: animation-range-end CSS 属性用于设置动画沿时间线的附着范围终点，即动画在时间线上的结束位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The animation-range-start CSS property is used to set the start of an animation's attachment range along its timeline, i.e. where along the timeline an animation will start.
ast.target: animation-range-start CSS 属性用于设置动画沿时间线的附着范围起点，即动画在时间线上的开始位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The aspect-ratio   CSS property sets a preferred aspect ratio for the box, which will be used in the calculation of auto sizes and some other layout functions.
ast.target: aspect-ratio   CSS 属性为盒子设置一个首选宽高比，将用于自动尺寸计算和其他一些布局功能。

ast.name: description
ast.source: In combination with elevation, the azimuth CSS property enables different audio sources to be positioned spatially for aural presentation. This is important in that it provides a natural way to tell several voices apart, as each can be positioned to originate at a different location on the sound stage. Stereo output produce a lateral sound stage, while binaural headphones and multi-speaker setups allow for a fully three-dimensional stage.
ast.target: 结合 elevation，azimuth CSS 属性使不同音频源能够在听觉呈现中进行空间定位。这很重要，因为它提供了一种自然方式来区分多个声音，每个声音都可以被定位为来自声场中的不同位置。立体声输出会产生横向声场，而双耳耳机和多扬声器设置则可实现完整的三维声场。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The border-block CSS property is a shorthand property for setting the individual logical block border property values in a single place in the style sheet.
ast.target: border-block CSS 属性是一个简写属性，用于在样式表中一次性设置各个逻辑块边框属性值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The border-inline CSS property is a shorthand property for setting the individual logical inline border property values in a single place in the style sheet.
ast.target: border-inline CSS 属性是一个简写属性，用于在样式表中一次性设置各个逻辑行内边框属性值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The box-direction CSS property specifies whether a box lays out its contents normally (from the top or left edge), or in reverse (from the bottom or right edge).
ast.target: box-direction CSS 属性指定盒子是正常（从上边或左边）布局其内容，还是反向（从下边或右边）布局。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The -moz-box-flex and -webkit-box-flex CSS properties specify how a -moz-box or -webkit-box grows to fill the box that contains it, in the direction of the containing box's layout.
ast.target: -moz-box-flex 和 -webkit-box-flex CSS 属性指定 -moz-box 或 -webkit-box 如何沿包含盒子的布局方向扩展以填充包含它的盒子。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The box-lines CSS property determines whether the box may have a single or multiple lines (rows for horizontally oriented boxes, columns for vertically oriented boxes).
ast.target: box-lines CSS 属性决定盒子可以有单行或多行（水平盒子为行，垂直盒子为列）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The -moz-box-pack and -webkit-box-pack CSS properties specify how a -moz-box or -webkit-box packs its contents in the direction of its layout. The effect of this is only visible if there is extra space in the box.
ast.target: -moz-box-pack 和 -webkit-box-pack CSS 属性指定 -moz-box 或 -webkit-box 如何在其布局方向上对内容进行排列。该效果仅在盒子中有额外空间时可见。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Shorthand for setting caret-color and caret-shape.
ast.target: 用于设置 caret-color 和 caret-shape 的简写属性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the desired shape of the text insertion caret.
ast.target: 指定文本插入光标的期望形状。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The container-name CSS property specifies a list of query container names used by the @container at-rule in a container query.
ast.target: container-name CSS 属性指定容器查询中 @container at-rule 使用的查询容器名称列表。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The container-type CSS property is used to define the type of containment used in a container query.
ast.target: container-type CSS 属性用于定义容器查询中使用的包含类型。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The font-optical-sizing CSS property allows developers to control whether browsers render text with slightly differing visual representations to optimize viewing at different sizes, or not. This only works for fonts that have an optical size variation axis.
ast.target: font-optical-sizing CSS 属性允许开发者控制浏览器是否以略有不同的视觉表现来渲染文本，以在不同字号下优化显示。该特性仅适用于具有光学尺寸变化轴的字体。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The font-palette CSS property allows specifying one of the many palettes contained in a font that a user agent should use for the font. Users can also override the values in a palette or create a new palette by using the @font-palette-values at-rule.
ast.target: font-palette CSS 属性允许指定字体中包含的多个调色板之一供用户代理使用。用户也可以使用 @font-palette-values at-rule 覆盖调色板中的值或创建新的调色板。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The font-variation-settings CSS property provides low-level control over OpenType or TrueType font variations, by specifying the four letter axis names of the features you want to vary, along with their variation values.
ast.target: font-variation-settings CSS 属性通过指定要变化特性的四字母轴名称及其变化值，为 OpenType 或 TrueType 字体的变体提供底层控制。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The font-smooth CSS property controls the application of anti-aliasing when fonts are rendered.
ast.target: font-smooth CSS 属性控制字体渲染时抗锯齿的应用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The font-synthesis-position CSS property lets you specify whether or not a browser may synthesize the subscript and superscript "position" typefaces when they are missing in a font family, while using font-variant-position to set the positions.
ast.target: font-synthesis-position CSS 属性让你指定当字体族中缺少上下标“position”字形时，浏览器是否可以合成它们，同时使用 font-variant-position 来设置位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The font-synthesis-small-caps CSS property lets you specify whether or not the browser may synthesize small-caps typeface when it is missing in a font family. Small-caps glyphs typically use the form of uppercase letters but are reduced to the size of lowercase letters.
ast.target: font-synthesis-small-caps CSS 属性让你指定当字体族中缺少小型大写字形时，浏览器是否可以合成它。小型大写字形通常采用大写字母形态，但缩小到小写字母大小。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The font-synthesis-style CSS property lets you specify whether or not the browser may synthesize the oblique typeface when it is missing in a font family.
ast.target: font-synthesis-style CSS 属性让你指定当字体族中缺少斜体字形时，浏览器是否可以合成它。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The font-synthesis-weight CSS property lets you specify whether or not the browser may synthesize the bold typeface when it is missing in a font family.
ast.target: font-synthesis-weight CSS 属性让你指定当字体族中缺少粗体字形时，浏览器是否可以合成它。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The gap CSS property is a shorthand property for row-gap and column-gap specifying the gutters between grid rows and columns.
ast.target: gap CSS 属性是 row-gap 和 column-gap 的简写属性，用于指定网格行和列之间的间隔。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The hanging-punctuation CSS property specifies whether a punctuation mark should hang at the start or end of a line of text. Hanging punctuation may be placed outside the line box.
ast.target: hanging-punctuation CSS 属性指定标点是否应悬挂在文本行的起始或末尾。悬挂标点可能位于行框之外。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A hyphenate character used at the end of a line.
ast.target: 用于行末的断字字符。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The hyphenate-limit-chars CSS property specifies the minimum word length to allow hyphenation of words as well as the minimum number of characters before and after the hyphen.
ast.target: hyphenate-limit-chars CSS 属性指定允许断字的最小单词长度，以及连字符前后最少的字符数量。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The initial-letter CSS property specifies styling for dropped, raised, and sunken initial letters.
ast.target: initial-letter CSS 属性指定下沉、上升和内嵌首字母的样式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The initial-letter-align CSS property specifies the alignment of initial letters within a paragraph.
ast.target: initial-letter-align CSS 属性指定首字母在段落中的对齐方式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables or disables the obscuring a sensitive test input.
ast.target: 启用或禁用对敏感测试输入的遮蔽。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The justify-tracks CSS property sets the alignment in the masonry axis for grid containers that have masonry in their inline axis
ast.target: justify-tracks CSS 属性为在内联轴上使用 masonry 的网格容器设置 masonry 轴上的对齐方式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The line-height-step CSS property defines the step units for line box heights. When the step unit is positive, line box heights are rounded up to the closest multiple of the unit. Negative values are invalid.
ast.target: line-height-step CSS 属性定义行框高度的步进单位。当步进单位为正值时，行框高度会向上取整为最接近的单位倍数。负值无效。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The margin-trim property allows the container to trim the margins of its children where they adjoin the container’s edges.
ast.target: margin-trim 属性允许容器裁剪其子元素与容器边缘相接处的外边距。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The mask-border-mode CSS property specifies the blending mode used in a mask border.
ast.target: mask-border-mode CSS 属性指定遮罩边框中使用的混合模式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The mask-composite CSS property represents a compositing operation used on the current mask layer with the mask layers below it.
ast.target: mask-composite CSS 属性表示对当前遮罩层与其下方遮罩层进行的合成操作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The math-style property indicates whether MathML equations should render with normal or compact height.
ast.target: math-style 属性指示 MathML 公式应以正常高度还是紧凑高度渲染。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The max-lines property forces a break after a set number of lines
ast.target: max-lines 属性会在设定的行数后强制换行

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines an anchor point of the box positioned along the path. The anchor point specifies the point of the box which is to be considered as the point that is moved along the path.
ast.target: 定义沿路径定位的框的锚点。锚点指定框中被视为沿路径移动的点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The offset-distance CSS property specifies a position along an offset-path.
ast.target: offset-distance CSS 属性指定沿 offset-path 的位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the initial position of the offset path. If position is specified with static, offset-position would be ignored.
ast.target: 指定 offset path 的初始位置。如果 position 指定为 static，offset-position 将被忽略。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The overflow-anchor CSS property provides a way to opt out browser scroll anchoring behavior which adjusts scroll position to minimize content shifts.
ast.target: overflow-anchor CSS 属性提供一种方式可退出浏览器的滚动锚定行为，该行为会调整滚动位置以尽量减少内容位移。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The overflow-block CSS media feature can be used to test how the output device handles content that overflows the initial containing block along the block axis.
ast.target: overflow-block CSS 媒体特性可用于测试输出设备如何处理沿块轴超出初始包含块的内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The overflow-clip-box CSS property specifies relative to which box the clipping happens when there is an overflow. It is short hand for the overflow-clip-box-inline and overflow-clip-box-block properties.
ast.target: overflow-clip-box CSS 属性指定发生溢出时裁剪相对于哪个框进行。它是 overflow-clip-box-inline 和 overflow-clip-box-block 属性的简写。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The overflow-inline CSS media feature can be used to test how the output device handles content that overflows the initial containing block along the inline axis.
ast.target: overflow-inline CSS 媒体特性可用于测试输出设备如何处理沿内联轴超出初始包含块的内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The overscroll-behavior CSS property is shorthand for the overscroll-behavior-x and overscroll-behavior-y properties, which allow you to control the browser's scroll overflow behavior — what happens when the boundary of a scrolling area is reached.
ast.target: overscroll-behavior CSS 属性是 overscroll-behavior-x 和 overscroll-behavior-y 的简写，用于控制浏览器的滚动溢出行为——当到达滚动区域边界时会发生什么。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The overscroll-behavior-block CSS property sets the browser's behavior when the block direction boundary of a scrolling area is reached.
ast.target: overscroll-behavior-block CSS 属性设置当到达滚动区域块方向边界时的浏览器行为。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The overscroll-behavior-inline CSS property sets the browser's behavior when the inline direction boundary of a scrolling area is reached.
ast.target: overscroll-behavior-inline CSS 属性设置当到达滚动区域内联方向边界时的浏览器行为。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The overscroll-behavior-x CSS property is allows you to control the browser's scroll overflow behavior — what happens when the boundary of a scrolling area is reached — in the x axis direction.
ast.target: overscroll-behavior-x CSS 属性允许你在 x 轴方向控制浏览器的滚动溢出行为——当到达滚动区域边界时会发生什么。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The overscroll-behavior-y CSS property is allows you to control the browser's scroll overflow behavior — what happens when the boundary of a scrolling area is reached — in the y axis direction.
ast.target: overscroll-behavior-y CSS 属性允许你在 y 轴方向控制浏览器的滚动溢出行为——当到达滚动区域边界时会发生什么。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The page CSS property is used to specify the named page, a specific type of page defined by the @page at-rule.
ast.target: page CSS 属性用于指定命名页，即由 @page at-rule 定义的特定类型页面。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The place-content CSS shorthand property sets both the align-content and justify-content properties.
ast.target: place-content CSS 简写属性同时设置 align-content 和 justify-content 属性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The place-self CSS property is a shorthand property sets both the align-self and justify-self properties. The first value is the align-self property value, the second the justify-self one. If the second value is not present, the first value is also used for it.
ast.target: place-self CSS 属性是简写属性，同时设置 align-self 和 justify-self 属性。第一个值为 align-self，第二个值为 justify-self。如果没有第二个值，则第一个值也用于它。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines what optimization the user agent is allowed to do when adjusting the appearance for an output device.
ast.target: 定义用户代理在为输出设备调整外观时允许进行的优化。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The row-gap CSS property specifies the gutter between grid rows.
ast.target: row-gap CSS 属性指定网格行之间的间距。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This property controls how ruby annotation boxes should be rendered when there are more than one in a ruby container box: whether each pair should be kept separate, the annotations should be collapsed and rendered as a group, or the separation should be determined based on the space available.
ast.target: 此属性控制当 ruby 容器框中有多个 ruby 注释框时的渲染方式：每对是否保持分离、注释是否折叠并作为一组渲染，或根据可用空间决定分离方式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The scrollbar-color CSS property sets the color of the scrollbar track and thumb.
ast.target: scrollbar-color CSS 属性设置滚动条轨道和滑块的颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The scrollbar-gutter CSS property allows authors to reserve space for the scrollbar, preventing unwanted layout changes as the content grows while also avoiding unnecessary visuals when scrolling isn't needed.
ast.target: scrollbar-gutter CSS 属性允许为滚动条预留空间，防止内容增长导致不必要的布局变化，同时在不需要滚动时避免多余的视觉元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The scroll-margin property is a shorthand property which sets all of the scroll-margin longhands, assigning values much like the margin property does for the margin-* longhands.
ast.target: scroll-margin 属性是简写属性，用于设置所有 scroll-margin 长属性，赋值方式类似于 margin 属性对 margin-* 长属性的赋值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The scroll-margin-block property is a shorthand property which sets the scroll-margin longhands in the block dimension.
ast.target: scroll-margin-block 属性是简写属性，用于在块维度设置 scroll-margin 的长属性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The scroll-margin-block-start property defines the margin of the scroll snap area at the start of the block dimension that is used for snapping this box to the snapport. The scroll snap area is determined by taking the transformed border box, finding its rectangular bounding box (axis-aligned in the scroll container’s coordinate space), then adding the specified outsets.
ast.target: scroll-margin-block-start 属性定义块维度起始处的滚动捕捉区域的外边距，用于将该框捕捉到 snapport。滚动捕捉区域通过取变换后的边框盒，找到其矩形边界框（在滚动容器坐标空间中轴对齐），然后加上指定的外扩值来确定。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The scroll-margin-block-end property defines the margin of the scroll snap area at the end of the block dimension that is used for snapping this box to the snapport. The scroll snap area is determined by taking the transformed border box, finding its rectangular bounding box (axis-aligned in the scroll container’s coordinate space), then adding the specified outsets.
ast.target: scroll-margin-block-end 属性定义块维度末端的滚动捕捉区域的外边距，用于将该框捕捉到 snapport。滚动捕捉区域通过取变换后的边框盒，找到其矩形边界框（在滚动容器坐标空间中轴对齐），然后加上指定的外扩值来确定。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The scroll-margin-bottom property defines the bottom margin of the scroll snap area that is used for snapping this box to the snapport. The scroll snap area is determined by taking the transformed border box, finding its rectangular bounding box (axis-aligned in the scroll container’s coordinate space), then adding the specified outsets.
ast.target: scroll-margin-bottom 属性定义用于将此框吸附到 snapport 的滚动吸附区域的下边距。滚动吸附区域通过获取变换后的边框盒，找到其矩形边界框（在滚动容器的坐标空间中按轴对齐），然后加上指定的外扩值来确定。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The scroll-margin-inline property is a shorthand property which sets the scroll-margin longhands in the inline dimension.
ast.target: scroll-margin-inline 属性是一个简写属性，用于在内联维度上设置 scroll-margin 的各个长手属性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The scroll-margin-inline-start property defines the margin of the scroll snap area at the start of the inline dimension that is used for snapping this box to the snapport. The scroll snap area is determined by taking the transformed border box, finding its rectangular bounding box (axis-aligned in the scroll container’s coordinate space), then adding the specified outsets.
ast.target: scroll-margin-inline-start 属性定义用于将此框吸附到 snapport 的滚动吸附区域在内联维度起始处的边距。滚动吸附区域通过获取变换后的边框盒，找到其矩形边界框（在滚动容器的坐标空间中按轴对齐），然后加上指定的外扩值来确定。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The scroll-margin-inline-end property defines the margin of the scroll snap area at the end of the inline dimension that is used for snapping this box to the snapport. The scroll snap area is determined by taking the transformed border box, finding its rectangular bounding box (axis-aligned in the scroll container’s coordinate space), then adding the specified outsets.
ast.target: scroll-margin-inline-end 属性定义用于将此框吸附到 snapport 的滚动吸附区域在内联维度结束处的边距。滚动吸附区域通过获取变换后的边框盒，找到其矩形边界框（在滚动容器的坐标空间中按轴对齐），然后加上指定的外扩值来确定。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The scroll-margin-left property defines the left margin of the scroll snap area that is used for snapping this box to the snapport. The scroll snap area is determined by taking the transformed border box, finding its rectangular bounding box (axis-aligned in the scroll container’s coordinate space), then adding the specified outsets.
ast.target: scroll-margin-left 属性定义用于将此框吸附到 snapport 的滚动吸附区域的左边距。滚动吸附区域通过获取变换后的边框盒，找到其矩形边界框（在滚动容器的坐标空间中按轴对齐），然后加上指定的外扩值来确定。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The scroll-margin-right property defines the right margin of the scroll snap area that is used for snapping this box to the snapport. The scroll snap area is determined by taking the transformed border box, finding its rectangular bounding box (axis-aligned in the scroll container’s coordinate space), then adding the specified outsets.
ast.target: scroll-margin-right 属性定义用于将此框吸附到 snapport 的滚动吸附区域的右边距。滚动吸附区域通过获取变换后的边框盒，找到其矩形边界框（在滚动容器的坐标空间中按轴对齐），然后加上指定的外扩值来确定。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The scroll-margin-top property defines the top margin of the scroll snap area that is used for snapping this box to the snapport. The scroll snap area is determined by taking the transformed border box, finding its rectangular bounding box (axis-aligned in the scroll container’s coordinate space), then adding the specified outsets.
ast.target: scroll-margin-top 属性定义用于将此框吸附到 snapport 的滚动吸附区域的上边距。滚动吸附区域通过获取变换后的边框盒，找到其矩形边界框（在滚动容器的坐标空间中按轴对齐），然后加上指定的外扩值来确定。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The scroll-padding property is a shorthand property which sets all of the scroll-padding longhands, assigning values much like the padding property does for the padding-* longhands.
ast.target: scroll-padding 属性是一个简写属性，用于设置所有 scroll-padding 的长手属性，赋值方式与 padding 属性对 padding-* 长手属性的方式类似。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The scroll-padding-block property is a shorthand property which sets the scroll-padding longhands for the block dimension.
ast.target: scroll-padding-block 属性是一个简写属性，用于在块维度上设置 scroll-padding 的长手属性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The scroll-padding-inline property is a shorthand property which sets the scroll-padding longhands for the inline dimension.
ast.target: scroll-padding-inline 属性是一个简写属性，用于在内联维度上设置 scroll-padding 的长手属性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The scroll-snap-align property specifies the box’s snap position as an alignment of its snap area (as the alignment subject) within its snap container’s snapport (as the alignment container). The two values specify the snapping alignment in the block axis and inline axis, respectively. If only one value is specified, the second value defaults to the same value.
ast.target: scroll-snap-align 属性将盒子的吸附位置指定为其吸附区域（作为对齐对象）在其吸附容器的 snapport（作为对齐容器）中的对齐方式。两个值分别指定在块轴和内联轴上的吸附对齐方式。如果只指定一个值，第二个值默认为相同值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The scroll-snap-stop CSS property defines whether the scroll container is allowed to "pass over" possible snap positions.
ast.target: scroll-snap-stop CSS 属性定义滚动容器是否允许“越过”可能的吸附位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
The scroll-snap-type-x CSS property defines how strictly snap points are enforced on the horizontal axis of the scroll container in case there is one.

Specifying any precise animations or physics used to enforce those snap points is not covered by this property but instead left up to the user agent.
ast.target:
scroll-snap-type-x CSS 属性定义在滚动容器的水平轴上（如果存在）吸附点的执行严格程度。

用于强制这些吸附点的具体动画或物理效果不由该属性规定，而是由用户代理决定。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
The scroll-snap-type-y CSS property defines how strictly snap points are enforced on the vertical axis of the scroll container in case there is one.

Specifying any precise animations or physics used to enforce those snap points is not covered by this property but instead left up to the user agent.
ast.target:
scroll-snap-type-y CSS 属性定义在滚动容器的垂直轴上（如果存在）吸附点的执行严格程度。

用于强制这些吸附点的具体动画或物理效果不由该属性规定，而是由用户代理决定。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the scrollbar that will be used to provide the timeline for a scroll-timeline animation
ast.target: 指定将用于为 scroll-timeline 动画提供时间轴的滚动条。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The text-decoration-skip-ink CSS property specifies how overlines and underlines are drawn when they pass over glyph ascenders and descenders.
ast.target: text-decoration-skip-ink CSS 属性指定当上划线和下划线经过字形的上伸部和下伸部时应如何绘制。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The text-size-adjust CSS property controls the text inflation algorithm used on some smartphones and tablets. Other browsers will ignore this property.
ast.target: text-size-adjust CSS 属性控制某些智能手机和平板电脑上使用的文本放大算法。其他浏览器将忽略该属性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The text-underline-offset CSS property sets the offset distance of an underline text decoration line (applied using text-decoration) from its original position.
ast.target: text-underline-offset CSS 属性设置下划线文本装饰线（通过 text-decoration 应用）相对于其原始位置的偏移距离。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The timeline-scope CSS property modifies the scope of a named animation timeline.
ast.target: timeline-scope CSS 属性修改命名动画时间轴的作用域。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The transform-box CSS property defines the layout box to which the transform and transform-origin properties relate.
ast.target: transform-box CSS 属性定义 transform 和 transform-origin 属性所关联的布局盒。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The transition-behavior CSS property specifies whether transitions will be started for properties whose animation behavior is discrete.
ast.target: transition-behavior CSS 属性指定对于动画行为为离散的属性是否启动过渡。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The speak-as descriptor specifies how a counter symbol constructed with a given @counter-style will be represented in the spoken form. For example, an author can specify a counter symbol to be either spoken as its numerical value or just represented with an audio cue.
ast.target: speak-as 描述符指定使用给定 @counter-style 构造的计数符号在语音形式中如何呈现。例如，作者可以指定计数符号要以其数值朗读，或仅用音频提示表示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The base-palette CSS descriptor is used to specify the name or index of a pre-defined palette to be used for creating a new palette. If the specified base-palette does not exist, then the palette defined at index 0 will be used.
ast.target: base-palette CSS 描述符用于指定预定义调色板的名称或索引，以创建新的调色板。如果指定的 base-palette 不存在，则使用索引为 0 的调色板。

ast.name: description

Specifically, the image would raster at these dimensions and `naturalWidth`/`naturalHeight` on images would return the values specified in this attribute. [Explainer](https://github.com/ojanvafai/intrinsicsize-attribute), [examples](https://googlechrome.github.io/samples/intrinsic-size/index.html)

`high`

`low`

ast.name: description
ast.source:
This is a nonstandard attribute used by iOS Safari Mobile which controls whether and how the text value for textual form control descendants should be automatically capitalized as it is entered/edited by the user. If the `autocapitalize` attribute is specified on an individual form control descendant, it trumps the form-wide `autocapitalize` setting. The non-deprecated values are available in iOS 5 and later. The default value is `sentences`. Possible values are:

*   `none`: Completely disables automatic capitalization
*   `sentences`: Automatically capitalize the first letter of sentences.
*   `words`: Automatically capitalize the first letter of words.
*   `characters`: Automatically capitalize all characters.
*   `on`: Deprecated since iOS 5.
*   `off`: Deprecated since iOS 5.
ast.target:
这是 iOS Safari Mobile 使用的非标准属性，用于控制文本表单控件后代的文本值在用户输入/编辑时是否以及如何自动大写。若在单个表单控件后代上指定了 `autocapitalize` 属性，则它会覆盖表单级的 `autocapitalize` 设置。非弃用值在 iOS 5 及更高版本中可用。默认值为 `sentences`。可选值：

*   `none`：完全禁用自动大写
*   `sentences`：自动将句子的首字母大写。
*   `words`：自动将单词的首字母大写。
*   `characters`：自动将所有字符大写。
*   `on`：自 iOS 5 起已弃用。
*   `off`：自 iOS 5 起已弃用。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
This is a non-standard attribute supported by WebKit on iOS (therefore nearly all browsers running on iOS, including Safari, Firefox, and Chrome), which controls whether and how the text value should be automatically capitalized as it is entered/edited by the user. The non-deprecated values are available in iOS 5 and later. Possible values are:

*   `none`: Completely disables automatic capitalization.
*   `sentences`: Automatically capitalize the first letter of sentences.
*   `words`: Automatically capitalize the first letter of words.
*   `characters`: Automatically capitalize all characters.
*   `on`: Deprecated since iOS 5.
*   `off`: Deprecated since iOS 5.
ast.target:
这是 iOS 上 WebKit 支持的非标准属性（因此几乎所有运行在 iOS 上的浏览器，包括 Safari、Firefox 和 Chrome），用于控制文本值在用户输入/编辑时是否以及如何自动大写。非弃用值在 iOS 5 及更高版本中可用。可选值：

*   `none`：完全禁用自动大写。
*   `sentences`：自动将句子的首字母大写。
*   `words`：自动将单词的首字母大写。
*   `characters`：自动将所有字符大写。
*   `on`：自 iOS 5 起已弃用。
*   `off`：自 iOS 5 起已弃用。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Property-value pairs that can be passed through this argument:
						* 'levels': Number of levels to unfold. If not set, defaults to 1.
						* 'direction': If 'up', unfold given number of levels up otherwise unfolds down.
						* 'selectionLines': Array of the start lines (0-based) of the editor selections to apply the unfold action to. If not set, the active selection(s) will be used.
ast.target:

						* 'levels'：要展开的层级数。如果未设置，默认为 1。
						* 'direction'：如果为 'up'，则向上展开给定层级数，否则向下展开。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Property-value pairs that can be passed through this argument:
							* 'levels': Number of levels to fold.
							* 'direction': If 'up', folds given number of levels up otherwise folds down.
							* 'selectionLines': Array of the start lines (0-based) of the editor selections to apply the fold action to. If not set, the active selection(s) will be used.
							If no levels or direction is set, folds the region at the locations or if already collapsed, the first uncollapsed parent instead.
ast.target:
可通过此参数传递的属性-值对：
							* 'levels'：要折叠的层级数。
							* 'direction'：如果为 'up'，则向上折叠给定层级数，否则向下折叠。
							* 'selectionLines'：应用折叠操作的编辑器选择起始行（从 0 开始）数组。如果未设置，将使用活动选择。
							如果未设置层级或方向，将折叠这些位置的区域；若已折叠，则改为折叠第一个未折叠的父级区域。
